reference_postmortem: At T-01:00, a ConfigMap update triggered a hot-reload in inventory-service. Due to a race condition in the reload handler, 2 of 4 pods loaded the new config while 2 retained stale values, causing inconsistent behavior: some pods returned prices in cents while others returned in dollars. The 'redis connection pool' and 'GC pause' alerts are unrelated — the Redis pool recovered on its own and the GC pauses are within normal JVM behavior. Root cause: ConfigMap hot-reload race condition in inventory-service. Mitigation: restart inventory-service pods to force consistent config load. Follow-up: implement config version checksums in health checks, switch to immutable ConfigMaps with rolling deployments, add config consistency verification endpoint.
